text: The first image makes me feel like an observer in a liminal, transitional space—an office or conference area in the midst of quiet preparation. It is organized but not in use, charged with muted anticipation. In the second image, the colorful and energetic display dedicated to 'R+D' (Research and Development) fills me with intellectual curiosity. I feel inspired, surrounded by symbols of innovation and inquiry, as if on the cusp of new ideas and creative exploration. Both scenes invite contemplation about progress and the nature of work, but through very different atmospheres—one calm and sterile, the other vibrant and alive.
